result.stdout:
Git extension to view pull requests

Usage: git-pr [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  PullRequestNumber  The target pull request number

Options:
  -?                 Show help information
  --dir              The target git directory
  --list             List local branches with associated pull requests
  --remote           List remote branches with associated pull requests
  --prune            Remove pull requests with deleted remote branches
  --shell            Shell out to git for ls-remote and fetch
